Program_Description: WIC is a nutrition program that helps pregnant women, new moms, babies and young children eat well and stay active.
Target_Population: Pregnant women, new moms, babies, and young children.
Eligibility_Requirements: Must be pregnant, breastfeeding a baby under 1 year old, had a baby within the last six months, or have children under 5 years old and receive Medi-Cal, CalFresh, or CalWORKS benefits or have a family income within WIC income guidelines.
Application_Process: Call to schedule an enrollment appointment; walk-in or same-day appointments may be available.

Program_Description: CCS provides case management and medical therapy for children with qualifying disabling, chronic, or life-threatening medical conditions.
Target_Population: Children and youth up to 21 years old with qualifying medical conditions.
Eligibility_Requirements: Must be under 21, resident of El Dorado County, have a CCS eligible medical condition, and enrolled in Medi-Cal or meet income criteria.
Application_Process: Complete an application and submit it to El Dorado County CCS.

Target_Population: 低收入孕妇、产后和哺乳期女性；婴儿和儿童
Eligibility_Requirements: 怀孕、哺乳1岁以下婴儿、过去六个月内生过孩子、领取Medi-Cal、CalFresh或CalWORKS福利，或家庭收入符合WIC收入指导方针
Application_Process: 联系我们后，我们可以安排注册预约，并确定您是否符合资格。

Program_Name: 婦女、嬰兒和兒童營養補充計劃 (WIC)
Program_Description: WIC是一項營養計劃，旨在幫助孕婦、新手媽媽、嬰兒和幼兒健康飲食、保持活力。
Target_Population: 低收入孕婦、新手媽媽、嬰兒和幼兒
Eligibility_Requirements: 懷孕，或正在給1歲以下的嬰兒哺乳，或過去六個月內生了孩子，或最近經歷過流產或終止妊娠，或有5歲以下的孩子，並且領取Medi-Cal、CalFresh或CalWORKS福利，或家庭收入符合WIC收入指引。
Application_Process: 可以直接前來，或當天預約。
